name: ratio-3.0
description: Ratio 3.0 — multi-tenant storefront platform (S2 vertical slice: Cloudflare edge + Hono origin + Postgres)

scripts.db:init: npm run migrate && npm run seed
scripts.pretest: npm run typecheck && tsx scripts/ensure-test-db.ts && DATABASE_URL=postgres://localhost:5432/s2poc_test npm run migrate && DATABASE_URL=postgres://localhost:5432/s2poc_test npm run seed
